text:
field comes from the Claim Residual Payment Indicator Code (CLM-RSDL-PMT-IND-CD) that is 
present on the first claim record included in the stay. If there is no CLM-RSDL-PMT-IND-CD on the 1st 
claim, then take the first-round code on any of the other claims that make up the stay. 

This field is new in 2015.
